chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَوْمِ الْوِصَالِ وَ صَوْمِ الدَّهْرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The continuous Fasting, and Fasting the whole time

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ صَوْمِ الدَّهْرِ فَقَالَ لَمْ نَزَلْ نَكْرَهُهُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa, from Aban, from Zurara who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about Fasting the whole time, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not Revealed. We<sup>asws</sup> dislike it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Aban from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about fasting in a connected manner. He (the Imam) said, ‘We still dislike it.’”
